api_key.description: Awin API OAuth2 bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

advertiserId.description: Numeric Awin advertiser account ID; substituted into every stream's path.

base_url.description: Awin API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Lower bound for the transactions stream's date window, in Awin's exact 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS' wire format (no timezone suffix). Unlike legacy, this bundle does not normalize an RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD value for you — see docs.md's Known limits.

report_start_date.description: Lower bound for the publisher_performance report's date window, in Awin's 'YYYY-MM-DD' (date-only) wire format for this endpoint specifically — a different format than start_date's timestamp shape, since Awin's /reports/publisher endpoint documents date-only startDate/endDate values. Optional for publisher_performance (omitted entirely when unset, matching that endpoint's own optional startDate). For creative_performance, Awin documents startDate as REQUIRED; when unset here, this bundle sends a fixed fallback literal ('2020-01-01', see docs.md's Known limits) rather than omitting it, since that endpoint has no documented tolerance for an absent startDate.

report_region.description: Awin region code (e.g. GB, US, DE) required by the creative_performance report. Awin documents no all-regions option for this endpoint; when unset, this bundle sends a fixed fallback literal ('GB', see docs.md's Known limits) rather than omitting it.

transaction_status.description: Optional transactions stream filter: one of Awin's documented status values (pending, approved, declined, deleted), sent verbatim as the status query parameter. Unset by default (no filter, matching legacy).

publisher_id.description: Optional transactions stream filter: a single publisher ID or Awin's documented comma-separated list of publisher IDs, sent verbatim as the publisherId query parameter. Unset by default (no filter, matching legacy).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
